jp.title: 映画「Michael／マイケル」AI、相羽あいな、市川染五郎、川尻蓮、ケント・モリ、辛酸なめ子、SOTA、仲宗根梨乃、長場雄、NI

jp.title: Valve新ハード「Steam Machine」「Steam Frame」“今夏”出荷へ―ストア表記「確認済み」のプログラムも両機器へ拡大。価格も気になる

world.title: Please explain: One Nation housing policy confuses its own as senator's interview turns into a 'train wreck'
world.description: After Barnaby Joyce needed a do-over interview to explain One Nation's housing policy, a senator's interview was terminated after it turned into a 'train wreck'.

world.title: BJP accepts K Annamalai’s resignation after days of speculation; leader to announce next move shortly

world.title: JG Superstore expands from e-commerce to physical retail with new flagship store
world.description: Photography and electronics retailer JG Superstore has opened its first flagship store at the Annex building of SM City North EDSA, marking the company's expansion from online retail into a larger physical presence.

world.title: Bitcoin is down horrendous
world.description: Geopolitical uncertainty and other factors are causing the coin’s price to suffer, even as Big Tech carries the traditional stock market to new heights.

world.title: Mali junta's offers $3.5M reward for jihadist leader
world.description:
Mali's military government has placed a multi-million-dollar bounty on the head of one of the Sahel's most wanted jihadist leaders. Authorities are offering two billion CFA francs, about 3.5 million dollars, for information leading to the capture or killing of Iyad Ag Ghaly.
.

world.title: What are Europe's alternatives to Instagram, TikTok and X?
world.description: As criticism of Instagram, TikTok and X grows in the EU, developers are building European social media alternatives. But can they compete?

world.title: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
world.description: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.

world.title: Hanson steps in after Joyce backflips on forced home sales
